meta.note: Story prompts. Each = {id, title, prompt, points[]}. Fill with your own prompts.

questions.title: Changes!
questions.prompt: Some people love change, others dislike it. Which change in your life has had the biggest effect on you? Tell the story of what happened.
points: Set the scene — where and when it began
Build up to the moment things changed
Reflect on how it affected you

questions.title: The Decision
questions.prompt: Write a story about a time you had to make a difficult decision. What happened, and what did you choose?
points: Establish the situation and the choice you faced
Reveal the outcome and how you felt

questions.title: A Journey to Remember
questions.prompt: Tell the story of a journey — real or imagined — that did not go as planned.
points: Set out: where were you going and why
How it ended and what you took from it
